chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1253 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< By filing statement for withdrawal, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed, therefore, under instructions, does not press this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
